about.feedback.dialogDescription: Follow these steps to submit feedback and help us resolve the issue faster.
about.feedback.step1.description: Reproduce the issue with as few steps as possible, and write down the exact sequence (screenshots or screen recordings welcome).
about.feedback.step1.title: Reproduce the Issue
about.feedback.step2.description: Open the log folder and find the latest log file: app.log
about.feedback.step2.title: Gather Logs
about.feedback.step3.description: Include a description of the problem, the specific steps you took, the log file, and screenshots or screen recordings if available.
about.feedback.step3.title: Submit Feedback
about.footer.openSourcePrefix: SpinningMomo wouldn't be possible without many wonderful
